recent_excerpts: Microsoft's April 2026 Patch Tuesday adds a critical warning dialog to Windows Remote Desktop, blocking threat actors from using malicious .rdp files to steal credentials via phishing.
Microsoft has patched a local privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2026-33104) in the Windows win32kfull driver, which could allow authenticated attackers to gain SYSTEM privileges.
A double-free vulnerability (CVE-2026-26179) in the Microsoft Windows Secure Kernel allows local attackers to escalate privileges, potentially to SYSTEM.
